Bob Dylan, 8/15/90, Calgary, Alberta, Canada, Centennial Hall, 2CDR

derived from LB-4928, (53min+44min), Audience recording > Unknown transfer > CDR (x) > EAC (Secure/Offset) > FLAC (Level 8);; has hiss band on d2t5 but not d1t5; a little harsh; very good sound [B]

brief static d1t5 0:18, 1:29; d2t5 3:18, d2t9 1:56 and probably a few more; end of d1t9 missing

1. Maggie's Farm, 2. Simple Twist Of Fate, 3. Early Morning Rain, 4. Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again, 5. Masters Of War, 6. Gotta Serve Somebody, 7. It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding), 8. Girl From The North Country, 9. Desolation Row, CD2
10. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right, 11. Everything Is Broken, 12. Tears Of Rage, 13. Political World, 14. It Takes A Lot To Laugh, It Takes A Train To Cry, 15. I Shall Be Released, 16. Like A Rolling Stone, 17. Blowin' In The Wind, 18. All Along The Watchtower
